channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Violence and natural disasters dominate global headlines, with significant incidents reported in Cyprus, Norway, the US, Lebanon, and Kenya.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Rising oil prices due to the US-Israel conflict with Iran are raising concerns about inflation and economic recovery globally.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Apple is set to launch new high-end products while Sony experiments with dynamic pricing for PlayStation games.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: James Conner reworks his contract to remain with the Cardinals, while several college basketball coaches face firings amid tournament season.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from satellite monitoring of bridges to new insights into Alzheimer’s and the genetic links between dogs and human behavior.
